ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the customer (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  "smoker" TEXT /* Smoker status of the customer (e.g., Yes, No) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "credit_cards" (
  "credit_card_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credit card */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer associated with the credit card */,
  "cc_number" TEXT /* Credit card number */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the credit card */,
  "cvv" TEXT /* CVV of the credit card */,
  "card_type" TEXT /* Type of the credit card (e.g., Visa, Mastercard) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("credit_card_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_credit_cards_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bills" (
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bill */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer associated with the bill */,
  "total_bill" REAL /* Total amount of the bill */,
  "tip" REAL /* Tip amount */,
  "day_id" INTEGER /* ID of the day of the week */,
  "time_id" INTEGER /* ID of the time of day */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the party size */,
  "price_id" INTEGER /* ID of the price per person */,
  "bill_date" TEXT /* Date the bill was generated */,
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment associated with the bill */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bills_price_id FOREIGN KEY ("price_id") REFERENCES prices ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bills_time_id FOREIGN KEY ("time_id") REFERENCES times ("time_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bills_day_id FOREIGN KEY ("day_id") REFERENCES days ("day_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bills_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bills_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bill associated with the payment */,
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment method used */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., Successful, Failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_payment_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_method_id") REFERENCES payment_methods ("payment_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_bill_id FOREIGN KEY ("bill_id") REFERENCES bills ("bill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method */,
  "payment_method_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment method (e.g., Credit Card, Cash) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "days" (
  "day_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each day */,
  "day_name" TEXT /* Name of the day (e.g., Sun, Mon, Tue) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("day_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "times" (
  "time_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time */,
  "time_name" TEXT /* Name of the time (e.g., Lunch, Dinner) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each party size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the party size (e.g., Small, Medium, Large) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price */,
  "price_amount" REAL /* Amount of the price per person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visit_history" (
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visit */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer associated with the visit */,
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bill associated with the visit */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the visit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visit_history_bill_id FOREIGN KEY ("bill_id") REFERENCES bills ("bill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visit_history_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loyalty_program" (
  "loyalty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loyalty program */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer associated with the loyalty program */,
  "points_earned" INTEGER /* Points earned by the customer */,
  "points_redeemed" INTEGER /* Points redeemed by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loyalty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loyalty_program_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
